params.SpellDescription: Add an amount of {G} equal to the sacrificed creature's power.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Add an amount of {G} equal to the sacrificed creature's power.

params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of your end step, conjure a card named Slimy Dualleech onto the battlefield if you control no Leeches. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on each Leech you control.
